name: Tenyi Spirit - Vishuda
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>威</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ヴィシュダ
desc: If you control no Effect Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If you control a face-up non-Effect Monster: You can banish this card from your hand or GY, then target 1 card your opponent controls; return it to the hand. You can only use each effect of "Tenyi Spirit - Vishuda" once per turn.

sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Slifer the Sky Dragon
Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from hand for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
